findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "sec_report_search" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

labels.name: run_sql
labels.description:
PostgreSQL SELECT over financial / market / alt-data tables — returns structured rows.

Hard rules (query fails otherwise):
- SELECT only, no CTE (`WITH ... AS`) — use subqueries.
- Period columns are TEXT, not dates — `period_end` is 'YYYY-MM'. Compare as strings (`period_end >= '2024-01'`); a `::d

labels.name: get_table_schema
labels.description:
Use BEFORE run_sql when you're unsure which columns a table has.

Look up column definitions (name, type, description) for a data table.

labels.name: fiscal_utility
labels.description:
Use to convert between fiscal year/quarter and calendar months for a given ticker.
Companies have different fiscal year starts (Apple Sep, Nvidia Jan) — call this
before filtering on period_end columns.

Fiscal year ↔ calendar month bidirectional conversion. Forward: ticker + fiscal_year + fiscal_qu

labels.name: list_tables
labels.description:
List alternative-data tables under the given categories. Returns each table's name,
one-line purpose, and column names (call get_table_schema if you need column
types/comments). Batch up to 5 categories in one call.

Use this BEFORE run_sql when you want to explore alt-data — run_sql alone won't
tel

labels.name: news_search
labels.description:
Use for any news, event, development, or statement question about a company,
theme, or the market.

Covers US, Japan, Hong Kong and A-share markets; The `ticker` filter takes
exchange-suffixed symbols: US bare (AAPL), Japan `.T` (7203.T), Hong Kong
`.HK` (00700.HK), A-share `.SH`/`.SZ` (600519.SH).

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "data" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_tables · Public sink: sec_report_list, sec_report_search, ticker_lookup, run_sql, fiscal_utility, news_search · Destructive: sec_report_search, run_sql.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_tables · Public sink: sec_report_list, sec_report_search, ticker_lookup, run_sql, fiscal_utility, news_search · Destructive: sec_report_search, run_sql

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "sec_report_list" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:

For the actual content use sec_report_search instead.

List indexed SEC filings for a given ticker with a summary header.

Returns: summary (period coverage, per-type counts) + table of up to 50 filings
(fiscal_year, fisc"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
